About.quote: Code is poetry that machines can understand and humans can appreciate.

About.p1Post: . I specialize in creating attractive and functional user interfaces using modern technologies.
About.p2: My journey into programming began with the curiosity of understanding how things work. Since then, I've been constantly learning and improving my skills.
About.p3: When I'm not coding, I enjoy exploring new technologies and sharing knowledge with other developers.

Testimonials.heading: What People Say About Me
Testimonials.sub: What the people closest to me say about my personality and work ethic

items.name: Sebastián Parra
items.content: Andrés is a super dedicated and creative person. His projects always look flawless and built with high quality; you can definitely tell he masters his craft.

items.name: Alejandra Bernal
items.content: I really admire Andrés's perseverance. Whenever he wants to learn something new, he never rests until he achieves it. He always has a proactive and positive mindset.

items.name: Natalia Escobar
items.content: Since he was little, he has proven to be someone very focused and disciplined. His ability to solve problems and his attention to detail stand out in every aspect of his life.

items.name: Michel Briceño
items.content: Having Andrés around is synonymous with motivation. The websites he has developed look super professional; you can tell at a glance that he is passionate and really knows his stuff.
